feedback_text: Agents feel useful for everyday school work.
Image generation was fun and easy to understand.
I liked the ethics and alignment part.
Medical examples made AI feel meaningful.
Evaluation tips are useful for school projects.
Attention and neural nets are interesting.
Agents are okay but I want deeper math.
RAG connects AI to real evidence.
Medicine is not my main interest.
Agents are like game characters that plan.
Models that see and hear are amazing.
